name: Variable-Rate Token Tax
description: A tax on AI inference compute (tokens) that scales with capability level, creating a new revenue base as traditional income tax erodes. Revenue funds transition programs and public AI infrastructure.
citation_1_text: Windfall Trust policy brief on token taxation
citation_2_text: IMF working paper on digital taxation

name: AI Wealth Tax
description: Progressive tax on AI-derived capital gains and wealth concentration, targeting the extreme value capture by AI company shareholders and compute owners.
citation_1_text: Piketty on capital taxation in the 21st century
citation_2_text: Saez and Zucman on progressive wealth taxation

name: National Skills Transition Fund
description: Government-backed fund providing income support and retraining for workers displaced by AI, with a focus on professional and knowledge workers rather than just manufacturing.
citation_2_text: OECD skills outlook AI and automation

name: Digital Public Utility Framework
description: Designates critical AI infrastructure as regulated utilities, requiring providers to offer access, maintain standards, and accept oversight in exchange for operating privileges.
citation_1_text: Windfall Trust Digital Public Utilities paper
citation_2_text: Aspen Digital public utility governance models
citation_3_text: EU Digital Markets Act as precedent

name: Universal Basic Income Pilots
description: Scaled UBI programs providing unconditional income floors, designed to maintain consumption and social stability during periods of rapid labor market disruption.

name: Public AI Service Corporation
description: A government-backed entity providing AI services for public sector needs — health, education, benefits administration — ensuring critical services aren't dependent on private AI providers.
citation_2_text: BBC model for public digital infrastructure

name: International AI Safety Research Fund
description: Multilateral fund for AI alignment and safety research, modeled on CERN, ensuring safety research keeps pace with capability development.

name: Democratic AI Oversight Board
description: Independent regulatory body with democratic accountability, technical expertise, and enforcement power to oversee AI deployment in sensitive domains.

name: AI Transition Fiscal Buffer
description: Sovereign wealth fund mechanism that captures AI productivity gains through equity stakes and compute levies, building fiscal resilience before tax base erosion accelerates.
citation_3_text: IMF fiscal policy in the age of AI

name: AI-Era Job Guarantee
description: Government employer-of-last-resort program focusing on care work, community development, and environmental restoration — sectors where human presence has intrinsic value.
citation_3_text: Center on Budget and Policy Priorities analysis

name: Compute Commons Initiative
description: Public compute infrastructure ensuring researchers and small organizations can access AI training and inference without dependence on hyperscaler monopolies.

name: Adaptive Education System
description: Reform of education systems to emphasize adaptability and continuous learning rather than fixed credentials, with AI-powered personalized learning pathways.
citation_1_text: OECD Future of Education and Skills 2030
citation_2_text: MIT Work of the Future report

name: AI Arms Control Framework
description: International treaty framework for military AI, establishing verification mechanisms, prohibited applications, and confidence-building measures between major powers.
citation_2_text: UN Convention on Certain Conventional Weapons AI discussions

name: Citizens Data Dividend
description: Mechanism for citizens to receive payments from AI companies that use public data and publicly-funded research, recognizing collective contribution to AI development.
citation_3_text: World Economic Forum data governance framework

name: Social Safety Net Modernization
description: Comprehensive reform of benefits systems to handle rapid employment transitions, including portable benefits, income smoothing, and AI-assisted case management.
citation_1_text: Brookings Institution future of work report
citation_3_text: Aspen Institute Future of Work Initiative
